articles.title: IndiGo CEO Elbers quits 3 months after airline’s worst-ever crisis
articles.summary: In a dramatic shift for IndiGo, CEO Pieter Elbers has stepped down following a significant operational failure that led to the cancellation of over 5,000 flights last December, stranding numerous travelers. The situation prompted government intervention to restore order in the airline's operations.

articles.title: India restaurants face LPG crisis: Shorter hours, menu cuts amidst gas shortage
articles.summary: A severe LPG shortage, exacerbated by the Gulf War and a government directive prioritizing domestic use, is forcing Indian restaurants to cut operating hours and menus. With imports heavily reliant on West Asia, many establishments face potential closures if supply disruptions persist, impacting thousands of jobs.

articles.title: India ensures household gas supply amid global energy crisis
articles.summary: India is diverting imported and domestic gas to priority sectors like households and CNG vehicles due to supply crunches caused by the Iran war. Petrochemical units and power plants may face complete allocation cuts, while fertilizer and refinery supplies are also reduced. GAIL will manage the diversion, with a common price set by the oil ministry.

articles.title: Air India to hike fares on jet fuel price surge
articles.summary: Air India passengers face higher fares. The airline is adding a surcharge to cover rising jet fuel costs. The Iran war has significantly increased fuel prices. This impacts Indian airlines, where fuel is a major operating expense. Major West Asian flight routes are disrupted. British Airways has cancelled Abu Dhabi flights.

articles.title: Bajaj Auto looks beyond Maharashtra to scale up Chetak EV production
articles.summary: Bajaj Auto is considering a new manufacturing plant outside Maharashtra for its electric scooter Chetak. This move follows concerns about incentives under the Maharashtra government's electric vehicle policy. The company is reviewing existing facilities and potential new sites. A decision on the plant's location is expected by June. This expansion aims to bolster Bajaj Auto's electric vehicle business.
